title: FabriFine
description: Fabric mods becoming one to give you the smoothest experience!
body:
FabriFine                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
 
Showcase Video: https://youtu.be/Q04DotfpnJI

Any performance may vary from device to device*                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                       
FabriFine is a mid-end modpack for better performance!
                                                                                                                                                                                                       
FabriFine consists of 40 mods for a better experience and some small non-game changer additions (for eg. AppleSkin )                                                                                                                                                                                                      
This project is able to boost 100 fps to up to 897 fps! ( Cpu/Gpu Apple M1 Pro )
                                                                                                                                                                                                       
This modpack also has shader support! I choose to use Iris Shaders

This modpack is trying to beat fabulously Optimized Modpack in terms of performance and is not designed for high-end devices, instead  this is designed to allow Minecraft to be playable a the weakest possible hardware!  

Why is this modpack different from Famously Optimized you may ask? Not only his modpack has less mods for better performance also is much newer! I will be updating or even replacing if needed any mods which seem to be increasing or decreasing performance! This modpack will be actually community designed "hopefully" (by that I mean what mods will come and go) This should be more effective because everyone has a different variety of hardware and software! Whit this much information and help from everyone this modpack can become the option for everyone!!! Thanks for taking the time for reading this small information and dreams about this modpack :)                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
FAQ
                                                                                                                                                                                                       
-Why Fabric instead of Forge?
I believe that fabric is more useful for daily usage. And is not optimized for heavy modpacks. Meanwhile Forge is very strong and is able to handle an insane amount of mods.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
-What OS (for eg. MacOS, Windows ) can I use this modpack at?                                                                                                                                                                                                      
Any platform which has OpenGL 4.0 or BareMetal support , basically anything that can run Minecraft !                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                       
-In what circumstances can I publish this project as my own?                                                                                                   
Any heavy changes can be published but a link to this project must always be presented!!!     

EXTRAS
                                                                                                                                                                                                      
-This  modpack comes with an extended variety of resource packs to suit everyones                                                                                                                                                                                                       

-This modpack comes with some of the most popular shader-packs pre installed!                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
Please feel free to report anything or tell me your ideas at the discord link provided!! :)
